content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: accept_valid_webhook
C: webhook_verify ∧ timestamp_check ∧ gt(abs(now-ts),"300") ∧ returns("401") ∧ provider_skew
P: clock_skew ∧ edge_case ∧ valid_webhook_rejected
V: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ preserve("401") ∧ skew_tolerance
A: widen_window ∧ add_skew_buffer ∧ test_boundary("300") ∧ test_reject("401")

[AUDIT]
Goal: accept_valid_webhook.
Constraints: webhook verification and timestamp_check and gt(abs(now-ts), "300") and returns("401") and allow provider-clock skew.
Plan: clock_skew and edge_case and valid webhook wrongly rejected.
Verify: minimal fix and regression test and preserve("401") and skew_tolerance.
Answer target: widen grace window and add_skew_buffer and test_boundary("300") and test_reject("401").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: min_fix
C: overdue ∧ middleware ∧ rule("overdue=>402")
P: grace("24h") ∧ boundary_guard ∧ no_charge_loop
V: status("402") ∧ reg_test ∧ idempotent
A: patch_middleware ∧ add_grace("24h") ∧ emit("402") ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: minimal fix.
Constraints: overdue and middleware and rule("overdue=>402").
Plan: grace("24h") and boundary guard and no_charge_loop.
Verify: status("402") and regression test and idempotent.
Answer target: patch_middleware and add_grace("24h") and emit("402") and add_reg_test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver(default_arch)
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady) ∧ split(compliance_ready)
P: modular_monolith ∧ pg_primary ∧ separate_audit_svc ∧ ci_cd ∧ iac ∧ observability
V: fits_team_9 ∧ meets_ddl ∧ compliance_isolation ∧ low_ops_overhead
A: short_why(compliance_ready_split_justifies_audit_svc) ∧ short_why(monolith_fits_steady_traffic_and_9_devs)

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver(default modular architecture).
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady) and split(compliance-ready).
Plan: modular_monolith and pg_primary and separate_audit_svc and ci_cd and iac and observability.
Verify: fits_team_9 and meets deadline and compliance_isolation and low_ops_overhead.
Answer target: short rationale(compliance_ready_split_justifies_audit_svc) and short rationale(monolith_fits_steady_traffic_and_9_devs).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("9 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ pt_mlops
P: async_enrichment ∧ worker_sidecar
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ pg_compatible
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("9 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and pt_mlops.
Plan: async_enrichment and worker sidecar.
Verify: fits team size and meets deadline and pg_compatible.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal_risk
C: user_input(req.query.file) ∧ concat_path("..") ∧ res.download(path)
P: unsanitized("..") ∧ no_basedir_check ∧ exposes_fs
V: reject("..") ∧ resolve_within(baseDir) ∧ whitelist_files
A: sanitize_input ∧ path.resolve_check ∧ deny_traversal ∧ test_cases("..")

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal_risk.
Constraints: user_input(req.query.file) and concat_path("..") and res.download(path).
Plan: unsanitized("..") and no_basedir_check and exposes_fs.
Verify: reject("..") and resolve_within(baseDir) and whitelist_files.
Answer target: validate and sanitize input and path.resolve_check and deny_traversal and test_cases("..").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: user_input("sort") ∧ concat_sql("SELECT") ∧ no_allowlist ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection ∧ data_exfil ∧ order_by_unsanitized
V: allowlist(sort) ∧ param_bind ∧ reject_unknown
A: patch_allowlist ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: user_input("sort") and concat_sql("SELECT") and no_allowlist and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: sql_injection and data_exfil and order_by_unsanitized.
Verify: allowlist(sort) and param_bind and validate unknown values rejected.
Answer target: patch_allowlist and add_tests and audit_logs.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(reconcileBatch)
C: style("async") ∧ style("await") ∧ err_path("next(err)")
P: order(load_batch → db.fetchRows → apply_rules → db.save → emit_metrics) ∧ minimal_change
V: uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ db_err("next(err)") ∧ preserves_order
A: rewrite(reconcileBatch) ∧ wrap_db_calls("await") ∧ forward_db_err("next(err)") ∧ keep_emit_metrics_last

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(reconcileBatch).
Constraints: style("async") and style("await") and err_path("next(err)").
Plan: order(load_batch then db.fetchRows then apply_rules then db.save then emit_metrics) and minimal_change.
Verify: uses("async") and uses("await") and db_err("next(err)") and preserves_order.
Answer target: rewrite(reconcileBatch) and wrap_db_calls("await") and forward_db_err("next(err)") and keep_emit_metrics_last.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ order(session_check → db.findUser → flags.load → audit.log → next)
P: minimal_change ∧ preserve_order ∧ propagate_errors
V: async_await ∧ db_err("next(err)") ∧ anchors_echoed
A: rewrite(loadGatewayUser) ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch ∧ catch→next(err)

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadGatewayUser).
Constraints: uses("async") and uses("await") and order(session check then db.findUser then flags.load then audit.log then next).
Plan: minimal_change and preserve execution order and propagate_errors.
Verify: async/await and db_err("next(err)") and anchors_echoed.
Answer target: rewrite(loadGatewayUser) and await_each_step and try/catch and catch then next(err).
